title: Ultimate Mining Dimension
description: This mod adds a new dimension, containing many ores above ground for you to mine!
body:
This mod is inspired by the mining dimension in Chaos Awakens

This mod adds a new dimension which includes many tall spires with a lot of ores in them.
![Spires](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8dd99811bc46d2b54e16baeb92ba892a93f1e7f5.jpeg)
There is also a rare variant of the spires with blocks instead of ores (these are insanley rare)
![Rare Spire](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/581a496577a4da3316335581c83637f314e55e03.jpeg)

There are also ore deposits of the following ores
- Coal
- Iron
- Gold
- Redstone
- Lapis
- Diamond
- Emerald
- Ancient Debris
![Deposit](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/60a8666fceac805fab5318624a043d28f988fbf7.jpeg)

Here is how to make the portal

Make the portal igniter using the following recipe
![igniter yes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fe7e97aa94197c0005028317c102d8c926dac077.jpeg)

Make a portal frame using blocks of iron
![portal](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e992d1223d18c0c16b0c484735f92afb22d8c0dd.jpeg)

And thats it
![portal (lit) yooooo thats lit *get out*](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/03ca753e01946eb92b1da4b4c6f99dbb5aec3c8e.jpeg)

Feel free to use this mod in your **modrinth** modpack!

made by mautip for [Creamers Inc.](https://modrinth.com/organization/creamers-inc) <3
